channel.description: Filtered papers from Angew. Chem. Int. Ed.

item.title: Dual‐Channel Interdigitated Aptamer‐Based Sensors for Rapid Small‐Molecule Detection in Biofluids
item.description: Angewandte Chemie International Edition, Volume 65, Issue 27, 1 July 2026.

item.title: Acceptor Backbone Cationization via B ← N Functionalization Enables High‐Performance Porous n‐Type Organic Mixed Ionic‐Electronic Conductors for Biosensors
